text_block_list.text:
After some time off, Narita Taishin<n>stops by my
office.
Huh? It's none of your... Ugh, I guess<n>it is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Same ol', same ol'. I took it easy and<n>spent my
time relaxing.
It seems like Narita Taishin had a<n>good break.
